summary: Small cleanup PR to satisfy local `melee-issues` checks across fighter, game-mode, stage, item, menu, and ground header files. The diff mainly modernized no-argument function declarations to `(void)`, removed an unused include, fixed an old K&R-style function definition, adjusted local linkage, simplified stage callback initializers/casts in `grzebes.c`, and applied formatting-only churn. The decomp.dev bot reported `No changes` for GALE01, indicating the cleanup preserved matching output.
what_changed: Converted no-argument functions from empty parameter lists to explicit `(void)`, including `fn_80171DC4`, `fn_80188644`, `fn_801A7FB4_inline`, `fn_801A7FB4_inline2`, `isActiveTitle`, `grCastle_801D0BBC`, `grCastle_801D0D24`, `grShrineRoute_8020A8A4_rand`, `ordering_func`, and `GetNumNameList`.
Replaced the K&R-style definition `void fn_800DBED4(gobj) Fighter_GObj* gobj;` with an ANSI prototype definition `void fn_800DBED4(Fighter_GObj* gobj)`.
Changed `fn_8018846C_noInline` in `gm_1832.c` from a separate external-style declaration plus definition into `static int fn_8018846C_noInline(void)`.

In `grzebes.c`, moved several early `grZebes_*` function definitions after the callback/data tables and simplified `StageCallbacks grZe_callbacks` entries by removing explicit function-pointer casts and `{ 0 }` flag initializers in favor of direct symbols and scalar `0`/`0xC0000000` flags.

Applied formatting-only cleanup in files such as `ftdynamics.c`, `grbigblueroute.c`, `grgreens.c`, and `grmaterial.h`, including cast spacing, line wrapping, include ordering, and removal of an extra blank line.
smart_moves: Kept the PR scoped to local issue/lint cleanup rather than mixing in decomp logic changes.
Used explicit `(void)` for no-argument functions, which avoids old-C ambiguous empty parameter lists while preserving generated code.
Preserved matching: the decomp.dev bot comment reported `No changes` for GALE01.
Removed unnecessary function-pointer casts in `grzebes.c` callback tables, making type expectations clearer instead of hiding mismatches behind casts.
Made the no-inline wrapper in `gm_1832.c` `static`, reflecting file-local usage and avoiding needless external linkage.
decomp_lessons: Local quality checks can be fixed with source-level prototype, linkage, include, and formatting cleanups without changing the decompiled binary output.
Prefer ANSI-style function definitions over K&R syntax even when the old syntax happens to match; it avoids parser/tooling issues and makes signatures searchable.
For functions that take no arguments, use `(void)` consistently in definitions and inline helpers.
Avoid masking callback-table type problems with explicit casts when the table can be made to type-check directly.
After broad cleanup touching many systems, rely on the matching report to confirm the changes are codegen-neutral.
naming_conventions: No new semantic names were introduced; existing address-style names such as `fn_800DBED4`, `fn_80188644`, and `grZebes_801D84A4` were retained.
Inline helper names with suffixes such as `_inline`, `_inline2`, `_rand`, and `_noInline` were preserved; the PR only corrected their signatures/linkage.
No-argument helpers should be declared as `name(void)`, including static inline helpers and local ordering/no-inline helpers.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Prototype modernization from `()` to `(void)` and K&R-to-ANSI conversion was used as a no-codegen cleanup tactic.
A local wrapper was marked `static` while retaining the body `return fn_8018846C();`, preserving the no-inline/matching role evidenced by the function name.
Formatting changes included cast spacing like `(u8*) gp->...` and `(s32) arg3`; these were style/tooling fixes rather than algorithmic changes.
Stage callback initializers in `grzebes.c` were simplified to direct function symbols and scalar flag values, reducing casts while maintaining table contents.
The bot report `No changes` is direct evidence that the PR did not alter the GALE01 comparison output.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
Automated decomp.dev comment: `Report for GALE01 (955ba9e - 3b29df3) No changes`.
follow_up_queries: Find remaining functions declared with empty parameter lists `()` that should be `(void)`.
Search for K&R-style function definitions that local `melee-issues` still flags.
Audit callback tables that rely on explicit function-pointer casts instead of type-correct function signatures.
Check for unused includes similar to the removed `mp/mplib.h` include in `ftCo_Attack100.c`.
Look for local wrappers named `_noInline` that should have `static` linkage.
